message:
🐛 Fix: Nightly Release Pulse respects repo filter (#8566)

* 🐛 fix: pulse handler respects repo filter (was hardcoded to kubestellar/console)

The Nightly Release Pulse card showed kubestellar/console data even
when the user selected a different repo. The buildPulse handler
hardcoded ghpNightlyReleaseRepo instead of reading the repo query
param.

Fix: read c.Query("repo") and fall back to the default only when
not specified. Also fixes the release-tag lookup which was similarly
hardcoded.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🎨 ci-cd: move Daily Issues & PRs directly under Live Runs

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* Add screenshot 1 for issue #8565

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------
